title: psychotria wawrae
intro: Psychotria wawrae, also known as the 'Native or Tahitian Kava', is a plant species native to the Pacific Islands, particularly in Tahiti. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, primarily in the production of kavalactones, which have been found to have anxiolytic, anticonvulsant, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Psychotria wawrae include reducing anxiety, insomnia, and pain, as well as improving sleep quality. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or a root extract, with herbal preparations often combining it with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
